title: Feuilleea sanguinea

This species is classified as a flowering plant, specifically in the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Feuilleea sanguinea follows the binomial nomenclature system, with the genus name Feuilleea and species name sanguinea. The plant's classification is used for identification and classification purposes in botany.
